class.name: UtilityAIAction
class.brief_description: An action to be performed by UtilityAI.
class.description: This node should be added as child of the [UtilityAIBehaviour] node. It's used when a behaviour is being executed by the AI agent. [b]Note:[/b] When the AI agent has chosen a behaviour, the action [code]step[/code] function is called to find the first action to execute. The action that is being executed must be set as [code]finished[/code] for the AI agent step function to be able to go to the next action. The action logic itself can be implemented anywhere else.

members.member: A user-definable numeric ID for the action. Provided as an alternative to using action node names for identifying which is the current action the AI agent is currently executing.

signal.name: action_entered
signal.description: Emitted when the action gets selected during the [UtilityAIAgent] [member UtilityAIAgent.update_current_behaviour] call.

signal.name: action_exited
signal.description: Emitted for the current action when some other action gets selected during the [UtilityAIAgent] [member UtilityAIAgent.update_current_behaviour] call.

signal.name: idle_frame_tick
signal.description: Called when the node gets the process tick notification. Can be used to handle action update logic.

signal.name: physics_frame_tick
signal.description: Called when the node gets the [Node._physics_process] tick notification. Can be used to handle action update logic.
